Table	Create Table
idSequences	CREATE TABLE `idSequences` (
  `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `projectId` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
  `entityType` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `prefix` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `currentNumber` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `minNumber` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
  `maxNumber` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT '9999',
  `padLength` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT '4',
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `entityLabel` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL,
  `padding` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT '4',
  `startNumber` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */,
  UNIQUE KEY `idSequences_entityType_unique` (`entityType`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_bin AUTO_INCREMENT=90001
